ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mazen Salfiti for and with petitioner Charlene Smith.

Mr. Salfiti reported that he has submitted a revised order. In response to the Court's inquiry, he confirmed that he was seeking extraordinary fees only for one ex parte applications, and that he waived his fees on the other one. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
